summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed in AdminLogin.tsx with proper state management and cancellation detection. REQ-2 is addressed in HeroSection.tsx with the updated fallback tagline. REQ-3 is addressed in QRSection.tsx with a static image replacing the dynamic QR code. The static asset file itself (instagram-qr-khudrangkalakaar.dim_600x650.png) is not shown as added in the diff, which may be a concern, but the code references it correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The static image asset 'instagram-qr-khudrangkalakaar.dim_600x650.png' is referenced in QRSection.tsx but is not listed as an added file in the diff. Without the actual image file being present in frontend/public/assets/generated, the QR code will not render.
